special_mechanics.name: Ladder Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Player can climb ladders for vertical traversal

special_mechanics.name: Elevator Operation
special_mechanics.description: Player can operate elevators to move between areas

special_mechanics.name: Teleportation
special_mechanics.description: Teleporters available for instant level traversal

special_mechanics.name: Fan Hovering
special_mechanics.description: Player can hover over blowing fans for suspension/movement

special_mechanics.name: Pipe/Girder Traversal
special_mechanics.description: Hand-over-hand climbing across pipes and girders

special_mechanics.name: Flamethrower Physics
special_mechanics.description: Flamethrower weapon can shoot through walls and launch player into air

special_mechanics.name: Laser Weapon
special_mechanics.description: Laser weapon can shoot through anything

tier_notes: Tier 2 - No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Wikipedia provides gameplay mechanics overview but no quantitative movement data. Speedrun.com lacks detailed physics documentation. Game design emphasizes level navigation with jumping, climbing, and environmental interaction rather than detailed movement mechanics.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Duke Nukem II article (gameplay mechanics)
